fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the set of criteria that is on the put-away template line.

fields.name: Find Fixed Bin
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you must put items in a particular bin. You define the bin by choosing the item on a line on the Bin Contents page and selecting the Fixed checkbox. If you haven't specified a fixed bin for items, choose the Find Floating Bin checkbox.

fields.name: Find Floating Bin
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you must put items in a bin that is not specifically tied to any particular item. A bin is considered floating when there are no lines in the Bin Contents page where the Fixed, Default, or Dedicated checkbox is selected.

fields.name: Find Same Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you must put items in bins that already contain the same item. You define the bin for an item by choosing the item on a line on the Bin Contents page. This setting doesn't consider the quantity that's currently in the bin.

fields.name: Find Unit of Measure Match
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you must put items in bins that have the same unit of measure as the item. You define the unit of measure for a bin on the Bin Contents page. To use this option, the bin must be assigned to a location where Directed Put-Away and Pick is enabled.

fields.name: Find Bin w. Less than Min. Qty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you must put items in bins that are currently below their minimum quantity of items. You define a minimum quantity for bins on the Bin Contents page.

fields.name: Find Empty Bin
fields.tooltip: Specifies that an empty bin must be used in the put-away process.
